## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix

## Test plan

<!-- Commands you ran to validate this. -->

- [ ] `make fmt vet test`

## Checklist

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `Unreleased`
- [ ] `docs/tools.md` updated if a tool or prompt was added/removed/renamed
- [ ] No new private / internal-only module hosts in `go.mod` or imports
- [ ] No secrets, binaries, or coverage files committed
